prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Of course! Here's a short pep talk just for you:

---

Hey there! You've got this. Remember, every big task starts with a single step. Take a deep breath, focus on the first small part, and before you know it, you'll be making progress. You're capable, you're strong, and you've overcome challenges before. This is just another one to add to your list of victories. Go get it! 💪✨
